overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of an armored character walking through a dark fantasy landscape at dusk. The character traverses a rocky path alongside water with large ruined structures visible in the distance under a deep red apocalyptic sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky shoreline path with distant ruins

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the shoreline path toward the distant ruined structure

entered.detail: large crumbling stone fortress with multiple spires silhouetted against the red sky
tall dark rock face forming the left boundary of the path
dark reflective water stretching to the right of the path
uneven dark ground with scattered stones and patches of grass

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an open rocky shoreline at dusk, with a massive ruined fortress visible in the distance against a deep red sky. The path runs between a cliff wall on the left and dark water on the right, creating a desolate and ominous atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrowing path between cliff and water with rock outcroppings

events.description: path narrows significantly as the cliff wall closes in on the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the terrain becomes more enclosed by rock walls and formations

entered.detail: massive boulder jutting out from the cliff face into the path

segments.scene_description: The path narrows as the character moves closer to the cliff wall, which now dominates the left side of the frame. A large rock outcropping appears ahead, and the distant ruins remain visible straight ahead while the water continues to lap at the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cliffside path with tall rock wall

events.description: character navigates past the large rock outcropping and continues along the cliff base

agents.ego_description: walking close to the cliff face with the water visible to the right, maintaining steady progress toward the ruins

segments.scene_description: Having passed the rock outcropping, the character continues along the narrow path at the base of the tall cliff wall. The distant ruined structure remains the focal point ahead, while the dark water reflects the red sky to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desolate shoreline that gradually tightens into a narrow passage beneath a towering cliff. It begins with the character walking an open rocky path at dusk, where a massive ruined fortress looms in the distance under a deep red sky. As the character advances, the path narrows and the cliff wall on the left begins to dominate the frame, leading the camera toward a large rock outcropping. The scene then shifts as the character passes this obstacle, continuing along the base of the tall cliff while the dark water to the right reflects the apocalyptic colors of the sky. Finally, the camera maintains its steady forward momentum, keeping the distant ruins as the central focal point amidst the oppressive stone walls.
